data.body: Consideration: [Consumer Impact] sprint-drift-check.sh parses THREE markdown formats today (## File Impact bullet list, markdown table with |File|Action|Task(s)|, ## Files to Create/Modify). sprint-review-scope-check.sh parses the bullet list. When refactoring to use get-file-impact, keep the existing markdown parsers as a SECONDARY fallback path for tickets whose migration was skipped or failed (see migration story 54ee-c932 — unparseable tickets are logged and skipped, leaving them markdown-only). Recommended code path: try get-file-impact first; on empty result, fall through to the existing markdown parser. [adversarial-review, blue-team accepted]
